name: vr-chat-screen
description: Transparent VR-friendly chat overlay for Twitch, YouTube Live, and Kick.

scripts.package: npm run build:openvr && electron-packager . "VR Chat Screen" --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out=dist --overwrite --no-asar --icon=assets/icon.ico --ignore="^/dist($|/)" --ignore="^/VR Screen($|/)" --ignore="^/installer($|/)" --ignore="^/\.tmp-openvr($|/)" --ignore="^/\.git($|/)" --ignore="^/native/VrChatScreen\.OpenVRHost/(bin|obj)($|/)"
